title: Null casting causes no results (silent server crash?)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE unitTestNullCasting (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(100), amount DOUBLE PRECISION, created_at TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO unitTestNullCasting VALUES (1, 'test1', 10.5, NOW()), (2, 'test2', NULL, NOW());
CREATE TABLE test_null_handling (x INT, y VARCHAR(50), z DOUBLE PRECISION, w TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_null_handling VALUES (1, 'example', 5.0, NULL), (2, NULL, 3.5, NOW());
SELECT * FROM test_null_handling WHERE y IS NULL OR (z IS NULL AND w IS NULL);
key_bug_features: Null casting in SQL query causes silent failures
